consentQaChecklist: Consent looks like Governance Console, not settings
Consent cards show capability, status, scope, evidence, risk, action, and policy
Consent states no productive consent accidental
Consent states one capability does not imply another
Consent states File Read consent does not imply indexing, Embeddings, or LLM context
runtimeQaChecklist: Runtime does not look like a raw console
Runtime blocked states explain why, missing, evidence, action, and disabled surfaces
Runtime does not imply content access is safe
modelsQaChecklist: Models communicate policy, not just selection
Models state No workspace context sent
Models state BYOK not implemented or not active
Models do not imply active provider or cloud activity
acceptanceCriteria: Models Policy Visual System artifact exists
Static previews contain no outside scripts, remote dependencies, network activity, or instrumentation
